data.name: 調教女警 - 無盡墮落的深淵
data.detailed_description:
◆ 故事


不法組織「蒼龍會」因掌控神秘「貨物」的海外渠道，在地下世界聲名大噪，這批貨物引發各方勢力覬覦，最終驚動警方發動代號「淨灘」的大規模突襲行動。

行動結束後，蒼龍會多名成員被捕、走私船隻遭扣押，然而最關鍵的一批「貨物」卻與負責該案的女警官「吳梓瑄」一同下落不明，一場席捲世界的權力風暴正在匯聚，而通往真相的鑰匙，隱藏在女警的口中。

◆ 人物&勢力


吳梓瑄（女警）：警隊中備受矚目的核心人物，作風正直果決。然而，她在查緝過程中對「貨物」展現出的強烈偏執，似乎暗示著她在正義背後隱藏著不為人知的秘密。

蒼龍會：玩家所屬的地下組織，面對警方的重創與內部危機，必須在有限時間內找回失蹤貨物，否則將面臨覆滅的命運。

◆ 玩法


◇ 調教與審問：透過多種「調教」手法擊潰女警的心理防線，逐步累積「精神壓力」，當調教達到閾值時，即可藉由「審問」以獲取關鍵情報，並解鎖更多互動場景。

◇ 推理與對話：玩家透過人、事、地三種元素組成的線索進行推理，玩家必須在對話及線索中抽絲剝繭，正確推理的選擇將引領玩家發掘事情的真相，甚至揭露女警的身世謎團。

◇ 記憶相片：藉著視覺化的線索，玩家能更清楚觀察到事件的發生與脈絡，進而推敲出事件的全貌。

◇ 多重結局：遊戲提供多條結局路線，玩家將在關鍵的抉擇中影響劇情的走向，遊戲將展開不同的結局，是揭發真相、沉淪性愛，還是遭受反撲，皆在玩家的一念之間。

◆ 遊戲特色


◇ 收錄超過 20 部核心H影片，並具備 100 組以上的視角與動作差分，提供極致沉浸感
◇ 包含 30 張以上高品質靜態CG，讓玩家身歷其境
◇ 5 萬字的劇情文本，結合犯罪推理與心理博弈，節奏緊湊、內容紮實
◇ 包含 3 種主結局以及多個支線判斷，打造劇情向犯罪推理遊戲

data.short_description: 警界之花「吳梓瑄」在追查組織「蒼龍會」時意外被擒。身為組織幹部的你，受命從這名剛正的女警口中審問出失蹤「貨物」的下落。在真相與慾望交織的密室中，你將透過極端手段挑戰她的意志極限，並藉由「記憶相片」拼湊出事件的真相，究竟是她先在執念中淪陷，還是你將落入她精心佈下的謊言陷阱？
data.supported_languages: 繁體中文, 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WIN11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WIN11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: The Endless Abyss: A Busty Cop’s Corrupted Soul
data.detailed_description:
◆ Story


The Canglong Society, an illegal organization, has made a name for itself in the underground world by mastering a new type of illegal drug.This drug is in high demand as it has the effect of stimulating blood circulation and inducing prolonged sexual arousal.However, this has also attracted the attention of various forces, and the police have launched a series of raids against the Canglong Society.

Recently, the police launched a large-scale crackdown code-named "Operation Clean Beach" and successfully arrested more than 30 members of the Canglong Society and confiscated important "goods" of the organization.However, the whereabouts of the drugs could not be determined after the seizure.The investigation revealed that the policewoman in charge of the operation, Wu Zixuan, may have been involved in internal operations to hide some of the goods.

In order to prevent the organisation from suffering huge losses and being liquidated by the upper echelons, the Canglong Society decides to kidnap Wu Zixuan in order to find out the true whereabouts of the goods and quickly retrieve the key supplies to turn the situation around.

◆Characters & Power


Wu Zixuan: A golden flower of the police force, the core character involved in the investigation and seizure of the operation, decisive and strong style.Although she appears to be loyal to her duties, her hidden behavior toward the "goods" makes people suspicious of her motives.Her secret not only concerns the whereabouts of the goods, but may also reveal a larger conspiracy.

Canglong Society: The player belongs to the illegal organisation, an underground force focused on the illegal drug trade. Faced with external oppression and internal pressure, they must quickly find the missing goods to quell the crisis.

The "Goods": A new type of illegal drug that induces strong sexual arousal and maintains it for a long time, and is in high demand. When the goods were confiscated by the police and disappeared, the goods became the focus of competition among various parties.

◆ Gameplay


◇ Story line: Players must investigate and interrogate the policewoman step by step to find out the real information about the "goods".

◇ Interrogation and Conditioning: Players can use various methods (such as threats, deception, teasing, use of props, etc.) to break down the policewoman's psychological defences, accumulating Conditioning Levels in the process.After the conditioning level is reached, key information is identified through interrogation.Unlock new training scenes and unlock more ways to interact.

◇ Conversation Choice: Players must choose the appropriate conversation based on the policewoman's reaction to find the key clues.If you make the wrong choice, you can be used by the policewoman to counterattack and get into a bad situation.

◇ Multiple endings：The game offers several endings, and every choice the player makes will affect the direction of the plot.Interrogating the policewoman correctly and retrieving the goods will be a victory; believing false information can lead to total defeat.

◆Game Features


◇ 16 HCG movie scenes with over 96 video angles and motion differentials
◇The game text 50,000 words
◇ Drama Crime Game
◇ Game ends: 3 types

data.short_description: A young policewoman, Wu Zixuan, is kidnapped to track down a criminal organisation. The player uses the threat of sexual violence to imprison and interrogate her in order to uncover secret information about the police.
data.supported_languages: Traditional Chinese, English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: WIN11
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: WIN11
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
